info.name: AIAS API
info.description: REST API collection for AIAS — Adaptive Intelligent Audit System. A multi-tenant Laravel 13 platform for audit engagements, compliance tracking, risk assessments, and audit workflows. Built with Passport OAuth2 and Stancl Tenancy v3.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — obtain / refresh / revoke Passport tokens.

request.description: Obtain a Bearer access token (password grant).
Exchange a refresh token for a new access token.
Retrieve the currently authenticated user with roles and tenant.

item.name: Tenants
item.description: Manage tenants (organisations / audit firms). Super-admin only for create/delete.

request.description: Retrieve a single tenant by ID.

item.name: Continents
item.description: Global continent reference data shared across all tenants.

request.description: Retrieve a single continent by ID.

item.name: Countries
item.description: Global country reference data. Supports continent filter.

request.description: Retrieve a single country by ID.

item.name: Users
item.description: Manage platform users. Supports RBAC roles via Spatie Permission.

request.description: Retrieve a single user by ID.

item.name: Roles
item.description: Manage RBAC roles and permission assignments (Spatie Permission).

request.description: Retrieve a single role by ID.

item.name: Service Users
item.description: System-level service accounts for machine-to-machine auth.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of service users.
Retrieve a single service user by ID.

item.name: API Keys
item.description: Manage API keys for service users.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of api keys.
Retrieve a single api key by ID.

item.name: MFA
item.description: Multi-factor authentication management (TOTP-based).

item.name: Audit Standards
item.description: Global audit standards reference data (ISA, IIA, GAAS, PCAOB).

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of audit standards.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "ISA 315",
  "code": "ISA-315",
  "description": "Identifying and Assessing Risks of Material Misstatement",
  "issuing_body": "IAASB",
  "status": true
}

request.description: Retrieve a single audit standard by ID.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "ISA 315",
  "code": "ISA-315",
  "description": "Identifying and Assessing Risks of Material Misstatement",
  "issuing_body": "IAASB",
  "status": true
}

item.name: Regulation Frameworks
item.description: Global regulatory frameworks (SOX, GDPR, HIPAA, Basel III).

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of regulation frameworks.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "SOX",
  "code": "SOX",
  "description": "Sarbanes-Oxley Act \u2014 US public company accounting reform",
  "jurisdiction": "United States",
  "status": true
}

request.description: Retrieve a single regulation framework by ID.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "SOX",
  "code": "SOX",
  "description": "Sarbanes-Oxley Act \u2014 US public company accounting reform",
  "jurisdiction": "United States",
  "status": true
}

item.name: Risk Categories
item.description: Global risk category definitions shared across all tenants.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of risk categories.
Retrieve a single risk category by ID.

item.name: Departments
item.description: Manage internal organisational departments within the audit firm.

request.description: Retrieve a single department by ID.

item.name: Groups
item.description: Manage user groups for audit team assignments.

request.description: Retrieve a single group by ID.

item.name: Clients
item.description: Manage audit client entities (organisations being audited).

request.description: Retrieve a single client by ID.

item.name: Audit Templates
item.description: Manage reusable audit program templates.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of audit templates.
Retrieve a single audit template by ID.

item.name: Audit Engagements
item.description: Manage audit engagements (projects) — the top-level audit entity.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of audit engagements.
Retrieve a single audit engagement by ID.

item.name: Audit Plans
item.description: Manage detailed audit plans for engagements.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of audit plans.

body.raw:
{
  "audit_engagement_id": "{{audit_engagement_id}}",
  "title": "Risk Assessment Phase Plan",
  "objectives": "Assess material misstatement risks across all financial statement areas",
  "methodology": "Risk-based audit approach per ISA 315",
  "planned_start_date": "2026-01-15",
  "planned_end_date": "2026-01-31"
}

request.description: Retrieve a single audit plan by ID.

body.raw:
{
  "audit_engagement_id": "{{audit_engagement_id}}",
  "title": "Risk Assessment Phase Plan",
  "objectives": "Assess material misstatement risks across all financial statement areas",
  "methodology": "Risk-based audit approach per ISA 315",
  "planned_start_date": "2026-01-15",
  "planned_end_date": "2026-01-31"
}

item.name: Audit Procedures
item.description: Manage individual audit steps and procedures within a plan.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of audit procedures.

body.raw:
{
  "audit_plan_id": "{{audit_plan_id}}",
  "title": "Agree revenue per ledger to source documents",
  "description": "Obtain the revenue ledger and agree totals to the trial balance",
  "procedure_type": "substantive",
  "assigned_to": "{{user_id}}",
  "due_date": "2026-01-25"
}

request.description: Retrieve a single audit procedure by ID.

body.raw:
{
  "audit_plan_id": "{{audit_plan_id}}",
  "title": "Agree revenue per ledger to source documents",
  "description": "Obtain the revenue ledger and agree totals to the trial balance",
  "procedure_type": "substantive",
  "assigned_to": "{{user_id}}",
  "due_date": "2026-01-25"
}

item.name: Workpapers
item.description: Manage audit evidence and working paper documentation.

body.raw:
{
  "audit_engagement_id": "{{audit_engagement_id}}",
  "audit_procedure_id": "{{audit_procedure_id}}",
  "title": "Revenue Substantive Testing \u2014 Q4 2025",
  "reference": "WP-REV-001",
  "description": "Revenue sampling and vouching procedures",
  "status": "draft"
}

request.description: Retrieve a single workpaper by ID.

body.raw:
{
  "audit_engagement_id": "{{audit_engagement_id}}",
  "audit_procedure_id": "{{audit_procedure_id}}",
  "title": "Revenue Substantive Testing \u2014 Q4 2025",
  "reference": "WP-REV-001",
  "description": "Revenue sampling and vouching procedures",

item.name: Findings
item.description: Manage audit observations and findings.

body.raw:
{
  "audit_engagement_id": "{{audit_engagement_id}}",
  "workpaper_id": "{{workpaper_id}}",
  "title": "Revenue recognition policy not consistently applied",
  "description": "Management has not consistently applied IFRS 15 revenue recognition criteria",
  "severity": "high",
  "risk_category_id": "{{risk_category_id}}",
  "recommendation": "Implement documented revenue recognition policy and staff training"
}

request.description: Retrieve a single finding by ID.

body.raw:
{
  "audit_engagement_id": "{{audit_engagement_id}}",
  "workpaper_id": "{{workpaper_id}}",
  "title": "Revenue recognition policy not consistently applied",
  "description": "Management has not consistently applied IFRS 15 revenue recognition criteria",
  "severity": "high",
  "risk_category_id": "{{risk_category_id}}",
  "recommendation": "Implement documented revenue recognition policy and staff training"
}

item.name: Finding Responses
item.description: Manage management responses to audit findings.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of finding responses.

body.raw:
{
  "finding_id": "{{finding_id}}",
  "response": "Management accepts the finding. A formal revenue recognition policy will be developed and staff trained by Q2 2026.",
  "action_plan": "Engage external consultant to develop policy",
  "target_date": "2026-06-30",
  "responsible_person": "CFO"
}

request.description: Retrieve a single finding respons by ID.

body.raw:
{
  "finding_id": "{{finding_id}}",
  "response": "Management accepts the finding. A formal revenue recognition policy will be developed and staff trained by Q2 2026.",
  "action_plan": "Engage external consultant to develop policy",
  "target_date": "2026-06-30",
  "responsible_person": "CFO"

item.description: Manage entity and process risk assessments.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of risk assessments.

  "inherent_risk_level": "high",
  "control_risk_level": "medium",
  "detection_risk_level": "low",
  "assessed_risk_level": "high"
}

request.description: Retrieve a single risk assessment by ID.

item.name: Risk Matrices
item.description: Manage risk scoring matrices for engagements.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of risk matrices.
Retrieve a single risk matrice by ID.

item.name: Compliance Requirements

  "description": "Chief executives must certify accuracy of financial reports",

}

item.name: Control Objectives
item.description: Manage internal control objective definitions.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of control objectives.

body.raw:
{
  "audit_engagement_id": "{{audit_engagement_id}}",
  "title": "Revenue Authorisation Control",
  "description": "All revenue transactions must be authorised by a designated authority",
  "control_type": "preventive",
  "risk_category_id": "{{risk_category_id}}",
  "status": true
}

request.description: Retrieve a single control objective by ID.

body.raw:
{
  "audit_engagement_id": "{{audit_engagement_id}}",

  "description": "All revenue transactions must be authorised by a designated authority",
  "control_type": "preventive",
  "risk_category_id": "{{risk_category_id}}",
  "status": true
}

item.name: Control Tests
item.description: Manage tests of controls linked to control objectives.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of control tests.

body.raw:
{
  "control_objective_id": "{{control_objective_id}}",
  "title": "Test revenue authorisation approvals",
  "description": "Select a sample of 30 revenue transactions and verify authorisation signatures",
  "test_type": "reperformance",
  "sample_size": 30,
  "assigned_to": "{{user_id}}"
}

request.description: Retrieve a single control test by ID.

body.raw:

item.name: Reports
item.description: Generate and manage audit reports (draft, final, management letter).

request.description: Retrieve a single report by ID.

item.name: Firm Settings
item.description: Manage tenant firm profile and AIAS configuration settings.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of firm settings.
Retrieve a single firm setting by ID.
